text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking by the outdoor stage...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Pleeease? I'd really appreciate your help!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Well, Falco's asking us to help her create a new
song.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The song's theme is "bespectacled girls in love."
That's why she chose Ikuno, Rob Roy, and me to
aid her.
choice_data_list: So that's why Falco's wearing glasses...
So that's why Falco's wearing glasses...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehe! It's all about looking the part with this kind
of thing! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, the song's composition is pretty much
finished, but it's still missing something...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If I'm going to make a song, I want to do it right
and really sell everyone on the charm of glasses
wearers! So please help me! Pleasepleaseplease
pleeeeease!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I have no problem with helping you, but what
exactly is it you would like us to do?
choice_data_list:
How would you define the charms of a
bespectacled girl, anyway?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Many characters you see with glasses are
portrayed as being clever, serious, and calm.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But isn't that, like, a stereotype? I wanna capture
a more realistic portrayal that communicates the
true feelings of glasses-wearing girls!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And while I'm at it, I'd like to show off their
cuteness and maturity, as well as how bittersweet
love is.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Hm... May I make a suggestion?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Even if we all put our heads together, it will likely
take some time to reach a solution. Perhaps we
should split up the work.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Um, so what exactly should we do?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I say we leave the story and lyrics to Rob Roy and
the planning to Hayahide. Falco, you can help
further establish the vision of the song.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I will act as your manager. If we devote ourselves
to the areas in which we individually excel, we
should be able to put on an extraordinary
performance.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy. I would like you to base the lyrics on all
the stories you know which involve glasses and
your own lived experience wearing them.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I see... If that's what you want, then I think I can
do it!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Falco, you're the best suited for arranging the
choreography. Please incorporate the motions of
wearing glasses and imbue them with the charm of
Umadols.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Can do! One cute glasses dance, coming up! ☆

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I assume I'm being tasked with brainstorming how
to best utilize both the choreography and the
song in our performance?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Correct. Under your planning, I think we can put
together an even higher-quality final
performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Finished! Thanks to all of your help, I've managed
to put together an amazing new song! ☆

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Congratulations. I'm happy to have been of help.
choice_data_list: You're a really great manager, Ikuno.
You're a really great manager, Ikuno.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Congratulations. I'm happy to have been of help.
choice_data_list: You're a really great manager, Ikuno.
You're a really great manager, Ikuno.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I agree! You were really wonderful! You were just
like a real manager!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy and I both tend to get overly engrossed
in our work and lose track of time. I really
appreciate you keeping us on schedule.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Hehe. It's an honor to hear you say that.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Well, then. We've gone above and beyond with
our work, so why don't we all take a break now?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okaaay! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno Dictus possesses such a wonderful
competence that makes her a great leader. We
can't help but be awed by her once again.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. We can only say we're finished after we
have performed the song. Let's begin rehearsing
right away.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All right! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, under Ikuno Dictus's capable direction as
manager, they begin practicing.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: La la la! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Wait a minute... Why do Rob Roy and I have to
sing as well?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That was fantastic! You're practically radiating
Umadol majesty! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, they formally name their idol group
"Glasses Outclasses" and put on a concert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that great success, Ikuno Dictus's glasses
gain an extra bright gleam to them.
